§6Centrifuge§f

§aSecond-tier ore processor — increased yields and the earliest renewable source of mercury!§f

The §bCentrifuge§f is the next tier of ore processing after the Shredder, providing higher yields from raw ores and crystals. It draws §e4 kHE/s§f during operation with a §e100 kHE§f power buffer, taking §e10 seconds§f per operation. It supports two upgrade slots for speed and power efficiency, or overdrive. Note: this processes solids only — for fluid centrifuging, see the Gas Centrifuge.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e4×§f Polymer Bar
§b• §e8×§f Steel Plate
§b• §e4×§f Copper Plate
§b• §e1×§f Analog Circuit Board

§b• Centrifuge Element§f (also crafted in Assembly Machine):
  §b–§f §e4×§f High-Speed Steel Plate
  §b–§f §e4×§f Titanium Plate
  §b–§f §e1×§f Motor

§6Processing Examples§f:
§b• Redstone Ore§f → §e6×§f Redstone + §e1×§f Drop of Mercury + Gravel (renewable mercury!).
§b• Redstone Crystals§f → §e9×§f Redstone + §e2×§f Drops of Mercury.

§6Other Ores§f:
The Centrifuge processes all standard ores with increased yield compared to the Shredder, making it a critical intermediate step before accessing the Electrolysis Machine's crystal processing.

§eTip§f: The Centrifuge is the earliest renewable source of §bMercury§f, which is essential for §bDesh§f production. Redstone is easy to farm or buy in bulk — run it through a Centrifuge for a steady supply of mercury drops!
